visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man standing in an outdoor park setting with green trees and buildings in the background. He is wearing a grey checkered flat cap, orange-tinted glasses, a blue zip-up hoodie, and a Roots brand t-shirt. He initially looks down thoughtfully before looking up at the camera. (2) As he starts speaking, the camera uses medium close-up and close-up shots, cutting between them to match his speech rhythm. He uses active hand gestures, such as pointing to the camera and counting with his fingers. (3) Animated graphic overlays with text and pricing information appear on screen as he lists the pre-order bonuses for the Samsung S25 series. (4) The lighting is bright and natural, indicating an outdoor daytime shoot. He maintains a friendly and expressive facial expression throughout the dialogue. (5) In the final segment, he smiles warmly and gestures with his hand toward his face while laughing before the video concludes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可 您過生活的好鄰居. (2) [Subtitle]: 欸老闆你知道嗎？ (3) [Subtitle]: 平面熊他跳槽到三星去了！ (4) [Variety]: 什麼? (5) [Subtitle]: 他已經下單預購了最新的S25 Ultra. (6) [Subtitle]: 他不行買，現在不行買. (7) [Subtitle]: 為什麼? 他現在買錯了嗎？ (8) [Subtitle]: 買錯了！ (9) [Subtitle]: 因為你只要在米可買了三星的S25全系列. (10) [Subtitle]: 你買好以後你到三星的官網登錄. (11) [Slogan]: S25U 送$4000. (12) [Slogan]: S25+ 送$3000. (13) [Slogan]: S25 送$2500. (14) [Subtitle]: 重點是米可他自己的官網還加碼再送兩千！ (15) [Slogan]: 還加碼再送兩千！ (16) [Subtitle]: 還有如果你有不限機型的舊換新的話再送你三千. (17) [Slogan]: 送$3000. (18) [Subtitle]: 老闆如果我報你名字的話會有優惠嗎？ (19) [Subtitle]: 報名字？嘿嘿！去就知道了.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey checkered flat cap, orange tinted glasses, a blue zip-up hoodie over a white and navy Roots Explorer graphic t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor park with a grassy lawn, lush green trees, some palm trees, and urban buildings and a bus visible in the far background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, electronic synth-pop track starts playing at a moderate volume. A clear, friendly male voice (Voice A) begins speaking. (2) A second, slightly distant male voice (Voice B) asks a short question. Voice A responds with a high pitch variability and energetic tone. (3) Subtle 'pop' and 'whoosh' sound effects trigger each time a text graphic or a price overlay appears on screen. (4) Voice A continues describing sales details with a rhythmic speech pattern. (5) The music continues steadily underneath the dialogue. (6) The video ends with Voice A letting out a playful, rhythmic chuckle 'Hehe' as the final SFX sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Disclosure -> Benefit Listing -> CTA/Teaser
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional advertisement for 'miko' (米可), a mobile retail brand. It uses a conversational hook about a friend switching to Samsung to list multiple discount benefits and trade-in bonuses for the Samsung S25 series pre-orders, aiming to drive traffic to miko's stores and website.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the retailer 'miko', display of its logo, and detailed listing of exclusive discounts and Samsung product pricing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced, social-media-friendly advertisement leveraging the '3c有意思tim哥' influencer persona to deliver commercial information in a relatable format.
